title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Landmark Books

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Landmark Books
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
